$comment: vibeflow: Stop hook refreshes .ai/handoff.md and (when phase+tree+approved spec allow) generates .ai/review-request.md. It never edits code, never merges, always exits 0. The allowlist below covers only state/reporting subcommands; `verify` is deliberately EXCLUDED because it executes an arbitrary test command via the shell — Claude must ask permission for each verify run. `init` is excluded because it writes many files.
